meaning: vi.做无聊事,讲废话n.废话,蠢话
examples: He talks such a load of piffle.
To this piffle the best retort is: grow up.
The entire report was piffle from beginning to end.
He had dismissed the allegations, incidentally, as "an inverted pyramid of piffle".
The wafflier the piffle, the more sharply Mr Nicholson wields his skewer.
